ddls:
CREATE TABLE "country_scores" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "universal_access" REAL /* Score for Universal Access */,
  "freedom_and_openness" REAL /* Score for Freedom and Openness */,
  "relevant_content" REAL /* Score for Relevant Content */,
  "empowerment" REAL /* Score for Empowerment */,
  "communications_infrastructure" REAL /* Score for Communications Infrastructure */,
  "access_and_affordability" REAL /* Score for Access and Affordability */,
  "education_and_awareness" REAL /* Score for Education and Awareness */,
  "free_and_open" REAL /* Score for Free and Open Systems */,
  "content_and_use" REAL /* Score for Content and Use */,
  "economic" REAL /* Score for Economic Factors */,
  "political" REAL /* Score for Political Factors */,
  "social_and_environmental" REAL /* Score for Social and Environmental Factors */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score for the country */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the scores were recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the scores */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "internet_penetration" REAL /* Percentage of the population with internet access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in the overall score calculation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "score" REAL /* Score for the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the score */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the score */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_scores_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
column_names: Score for Free and Open Systems
Score for Social and Environmental Factors
Year when the scores were recorded
Additional notes or comments about the scores
Region where the country is located
GDP per capita of the country
Percentage of the population with internet access

Unit of measurement for the metric
Source of the data for the metric
